use regex::Regex;
use std::sync::LazyLock;

// GOOD: regex compiled once
static DATE_RE: LazyLock<Regex> = LazyLock::new(|| {
    Regex::new(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$").unwrap()
});

fn validate_entries(entries: &[Entry]) -> Vec<&Entry> {
    entries.iter()
        .filter(|entry| DATE_RE.is_match(&entry.date))
        .collect()
}

fn extract_fields(text: &str, patterns: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    let compiled: Vec<Regex> = patterns.iter()
        .map(|p| Regex::new(p).unwrap())
        .collect();

    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for re in &compiled {
        if let Some(caps) = re.captures(text) {
            results.push(caps[1].to_string());
        }
    }
    results
}
